caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black sweatshirt with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering, sits in a recording studio. He is wearing a gold chain and a gold watch. He is positioned behind a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. The background features a white wall with a repeating logo that says "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. A blue sign behind him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug is visible on the desk. In the lower-left corner, there is a small logo that includes a question mark and the text "THE TALK OUT". The man remains in a seated position throughout the sequence, smiling and looking toward someone off-screen. His posture and expression remain largely consistent across the frames, with only subtle shifts in his facial expression and head position as he interacts with another person.
